issue_title: Fix some issues that may arise on BUFFER_FULL situations
issue_body_preview:
I'm working on heuristics to determine adaptively how much the current device can hold in its audio and video buffers.

To quickly iterate on this, I'm setting a very high (or even `Infinity`) `wantedBufferAhead` to quickly fill-up memory until the device has to perform a strategy to free it.

W
test_description_zh: 在播放器中设置一个非常高的 wantedBufferAhead 值（例如 Infinity），播放视频内容，观察当设备内存缓冲区被填满（BUFFER_FULL 情况）时播放器的行为是否正常，是否能继续播放或正确处理缓冲策略。
expected_result_zh: 当缓冲区被填满触发 BUFFER_FULL 状态时，播放器应能正确处理该情况，不会崩溃、卡死或出现播放中断，视频应继续正常播放或播放器应采取合理的缓冲释放策略。
